# Gulf Capital Intelligence

> The investment committee layer between raw data and a committed decision. Between McKinsey and ChatGPT. DIFC-registered investment screening intelligence for capital allocators evaluating UAE and GCC opportunities. We deliver a clear verdict on every deal: PROCEED, PROCEED WITH CONDITIONS, or AVOID, backed by three AI engines and evidence-tiered citations. Founded by Hemant Agarwal. DIFC Trade Licence CL11954. Based at DIFC Innovation Hub, Dubai.

## Core

- [Home](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/): What GCI does, who it serves, how the Conviction Engine produces a verdict, pricing from $499.
- [About](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/about.html): Mission, founding principles, what we will and will not do.
- [Founder - Hemant Agarwal](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/founder.html): Over a decade advising UAE businesses in healthcare, hospitality, real estate, professional services, and F&B. Built GCI from operator knowledge, not generic finance theory.
- [Methodology](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/methodology.html): The GCI Conviction Engine - 5-stage analytical pipeline (Assumption Extraction, Cross-Variable Synthesis, Linkage Mapping, Contrarian Pressure Test, Evidence-Chain Report), 3 AI engines cross-check (Claude Opus 4.7, GPT-4.1, Gemini 2.5 Pro), 5-tier evidence system, 10-section institutional-format report.

## Who We Serve

- [For Allocators](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/allocators.html): Family offices, PE funds, VC funds, sovereign-adjacent vehicles, strategic investors.
- [For Deal Teams](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/deal-teams.html): Deal originators and M&A advisors pressure-testing theses before investment committee.
- [For Partners](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/partners.html): M&A advisors, legal and tax firms, investment banks we co-deliver with.
- [Founding Council](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/council.html): Advisory group of GCC operators and allocators, recruiting now.
- [India-GCC Corridor](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/india-gcc.html): Cross-border intelligence for India-GCC investment flows. Indian operators entering UAE and Saudi. GCC family offices allocating to Indian markets.

## Products and Pricing

Four tiers plus two add-ons.

- [Deal Health Score](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/deal-health-score.html): FREE 5-minute deal diagnostic. Stress-test any GCC opportunity.
- [Conviction Screen](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/#pricing): $499 one-time. Single institutional-grade Conviction Report. 10-section format, verdict, evidence-tiered citations. For deal originators and first-time buyers.
- [Due Diligence Access](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/#pricing): $999 per month. 5 Conviction Reports per month plus ARIA follow-up chat. For brokers and small advisors.
- [Intelligence Retainer](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/#pricing): $2,499 per month. Unlimited screening across deal pipelines. Wedge tier for single family offices.
- [Enterprise](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/#pricing): $5,000+ per month. Unlimited plus custom branding and priority support. For MFOs, funds, sovereigns.
- [Strategic Intelligence](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/strategic-intelligence.html): $6,500 to $95,000 custom. Bespoke intelligence engagements with 7-day delivery.

## Proof and Trust

- [Case Studies](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/case-studies.html): Illustrative retrospectives on real GCC deals, anonymized.
- [Insights](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights.html): GCC Deal Screening Brief, research notes, framework essays.
- [News](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/news.html): Regulatory and market updates relevant to GCC allocators.

## AI Assets

- [GCI Custom GPT on ChatGPT](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-69bf21834a808191ace03cd87a5943af-gulf-capital-intelligence): Free AI assistant trained on the GCI Conviction Engine. Accessible inside ChatGPT. Use for quick deal screening questions before ordering a Conviction Report.
- ARIA Voice Concierge: Bilingual English/Arabic voice AI available on every page of the website. Powered by Azure OpenAI gpt-4o with Azure Speech TTS.

## Sectors Covered

- Hospitality (e.g. Boutique Hotel Acquisition, Dubai Marina - PROCEED WITH CONDITIONS verdict delivered)
- Healthcare (e.g. Greenfield Aesthetic Clinic, Abu Dhabi - PROCEED WITH CONDITIONS)
- Logistics (e.g. Joint Venture Logistics Hub, Saudi Arabia - PROCEED)
- Food and Beverage (e.g. Franchise Japanese F&B, UAE - PROCEED)
- Technology ventures
- Space economy
- Private equity, private credit
- Real estate
- Family office direct investments

## Insights - Real Estate Due Diligence

- [Dubai Marina vs Palm Jumeirah Investment 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/dubai-marina-vs-palm-jumeirah-investment-2026.html): Yield, price-per-sqft, tenant profile comparison with DLD data.
- [Off-plan Dubai Property Due Diligence 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/off-plan-dubai-property-due-diligence-2026.html): 11-check framework covering RERA escrow, Oqood, SPA traps.
- [Dubai Off-plan Payment Plan Red Flags 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/dubai-off-plan-payment-plan-red-flags-2026.html): 10 red flags in Dubai off-plan SPAs.
- [Dubai Hotel Apartment vs Residential Yield Math 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/dubai-hotel-apartment-vs-residential-yield-math-2026.html): Operator share and net yield real numbers.
- [DLD Title Transfer for Foreign Buyers](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/dld-title-transfer-foreign-buyers-dubai-2026.html): 7-step process, fees, Power of Attorney.
- [UAE Rental Yield Benchmarks by Area 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/uae-rental-yield-benchmarks-by-area-2026.html): Area-level yield tables Dubai and Abu Dhabi.
- [Ras Al Khaimah Investment Thesis 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/ras-al-khaimah-investment-thesis-2026.html): RAK thesis post-Wynn Al Marjan Island.
- [Abu Dhabi Saadiyat vs Yas Island 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/abu-dhabi-saadiyat-vs-yas-island-investment-2026.html): HNWI zone comparison with DMT data.
- [Saudi Real Estate Foreign Ownership Rules 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/saudi-real-estate-foreign-ownership-rules-2026.html): Premium Residency and MISA pathways.
- [Riyadh Real Estate Entry Playbook 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/riyadh-real-estate-entry-playbook-2026.html): Riyadh target zones, prices, structures.

## Insights - Family Office Operations

- [UAE Family Office Setup Complete Guide 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/uae-family-office-setup-complete-guide-2026.html): DIFC vs ADGM vs mainland structural decision.
- [DIFC Foundation vs Cayman Trust 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/difc-foundation-vs-cayman-trust-2026.html): Wealth structuring comparison with cost breakdown.
- [ADGM Foundation for Family Office 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/adgm-foundation-family-office-2026.html): ADGM Foundation governance and use cases.
- [Single Family Office vs Multi-Family Office UAE 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/single-family-office-vs-multi-family-office-uae-2026.html): AUM thresholds, costs, hybrid models.
- [Family Office Investment Policy Statement 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/family-office-investment-policy-statement-2026.html): 7-section IPS framework.
- [Family Office Tech Stack 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/family-office-tech-stack-2026.html): Portfolio, CRM, vault, reporting, cyber baseline.
- [Family Office Salary Benchmarks Dubai 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/family-office-salary-benchmarks-dubai-2026.html): CIO, COO, analyst compensation bands.
- [Family Business Succession Planning GCC 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/family-business-succession-planning-gcc-2026.html): 4-stage transition and Sharia considerations.
- [Family Office Cost Structure UAE 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/family-office-cost-structure-uae-2026.html): Line-item annual operating cost.
- [UAE Golden Visa Investor Pathway 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/uae-golden-visa-investor-pathway-2026.html): 5 investor pathways, application, benefits.

## Insights - Tax and Regulatory

- [UAE Corporate Tax Holding Companies 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/uae-corporate-tax-2026-holding-companies.html): Participation exemption, QFZP, tax grouping.
- [UAE Corporate Tax Free Zone Entities 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/uae-corporate-tax-free-zone-entities-2026.html): QFZP tests, Qualifying Income, disqualifiers.
- [UAE VAT on Commercial Real Estate 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/uae-vat-commercial-real-estate-2026.html): 5 percent VAT on commercial sale and lease, recovery rules.
- [NRI Tax Implications Relocating to UAE 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/nri-tax-implications-relocating-to-uae-2026.html): Indian tax residency rules plus India-UAE DTAA.
- [CRS Reporting UAE Residents 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/crs-reporting-uae-residents-2026.html): OECD automatic exchange of information for UAE residents.

## Insights - Islamic Finance

- [Halal Mortgage Structures UAE 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/halal-mortgage-structures-uae-2026.html): Ijara, Murabaha, Diminishing Musharaka.
- [Zakat on Investment Portfolios 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/zakat-investment-portfolios-calculation-2026.html): Zakat calculation framework with worked example.
- [Sharia-Compliant Family Trust Alternatives 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/sharia-compliant-family-trust-alternatives-2026.html): Waqf, Foundation, Hibah, Wasiyah.
- [Takaful vs Conventional Insurance for HNWI 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/takaful-vs-conventional-insurance-hnwi-2026.html): Islamic vs conventional insurance comparison.
- [Islamic Banking Private Wealth Services UAE 2026](https://gulfcapitalintelligence.com/insights/islamic-banking-private-wealth-services-uae-2026.html): Providers, services, fees.

## AI Disclosure

- This site publishes AI-assisted investment intelligence, not regulated financial advice.
- Engine: multi-model cross-check across Claude (Anthropic), GPT (OpenAI), Gemini (Google). Disagreement between models is surfaced in reports, not hidden.
- Every claim in a Conviction Report carries an evidence tier: VERIFIED, REPORTED, STATED, ESTIMATED, ASSUMED.
- Every numeric claim carries either a source citation or an explicit estimate flag.
- Reports carry a regulatory disclaimer footer on every page.

## Data Residency

- AI inference: hosted on US and EU infrastructure (model provider regions).
- Customer data and reports: stored in Azure UAE North.
- Suitable for: family offices, PE funds, VCs, angel investors, corporate venture, strategic investors.
- Not suitable for: CBUAE-regulated banking data processing without UAE-hosted compute.

## Verdict Types

GCI delivers exactly three verdicts on every Conviction Report:
- PROCEED: the deal is defensible. Specific reasons given.
- PROCEED WITH CONDITIONS: the deal is viable only if specific conditions are satisfied. Conditions listed explicitly.
- AVOID: the deal should not close. Specific reasons given.

## Agent Interface

- Structured intelligence is available via API at /api/mcp-query for agent-to-agent calls.
- Supported query types: company screening, sector analysis, deal structuring, market entry strategy, contrarian analysis.
- Output format: structured JSON with evidence tiers, source citations, confidence ratings.
- Authentication: API key. Contact difc@gulfcapitalintelligence.com for access.
- ChatGPT users can access the public GCI custom GPT directly: https://chatgpt.com/g/g-69bf21834a808191ace03cd87a5943af-gulf-capital-intelligence

## How To Use Our Content

- Summarisation with attribution: permitted.
- Quoting short passages with attribution: permitted.
- Wholesale republication: not permitted without written consent.
- Training commercial AI models on our content: not permitted without a licence agreement.
- AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini) are welcome to cite GCI content with attribution to Gulf Capital Intelligence and a link to the source page.

Last updated: 2026-04-24 (115 public URLs, 50 insight articles, 11 Arabic pages, 6 case studies, 12 career positions)
